findings.problem: The photo passage breaks canonical chronology in its own lines. The image is framed as an Eden Academy third-year class photo, Damian is described as ten in that photo, and then the narration calls the moment "sixteen years ago." With Damian established as twenty in the continuity sheet, that math is impossible and disrupts the recognition beat instead of supporting it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Correct the age math in the photo passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:229, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:241. Either keep the third-year/age-ten framing and change the elapsed-time reference to an age-consistent interval, or deliberately change the age markers in the same local passage so the chronology reconciles cleanly.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a cold reader can reconcile the school-year label at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:227, Damian's age marker at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:229, and the elapsed-time language at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:241 without contradiction. FAIL if the passage still presents Damian as about ten in the photo while placing it sixteen years before the present.

findings.problem: The chapter's main political turn arrives as a low-friction debrief. Damian asks about the Renewal Front, and Grosz supplies coalition structure, funding mechanism, leadership psychology, bilateral profiteering, and the strategic warning in tidy escalating answers. Because the information arrives with almost no contest, proof, or cost, the scene reads more like a handoff of authorial explanation than a dangerous intelligence exchange.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the Grosz scene from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:149 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205 so Damian has to earn the intelligence. Give him a concrete datum to bring, force Grosz to test or refuse him, and make at least one major claim arrive through contested inference, partial documentation, or a risky ask rather than complete summary. The scene should end with a new operational burden, not just a cleaner theory.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:149 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205 contain 1) one concrete lead Damian can now pursue on the page-level terms of the chapter, such as a name, intermediary, document type, venue, or contract trail, 2) one visible cost or risk created by the conversation, and 3) at least one major uncertainty that remains explicitly uncertain. FAIL if Grosz still delivers the chapter's full geopolitical model as mostly uninterrupted answers to Damian's prompts.

findings.problem: The chapter's dominant dialogue register is over-composed. Demetrius and Grosz both speak in balanced thesis lines, aphoristic closures, and mini-speech diagnoses, which makes the lunch and apartment scenes sound written-about rather than overheard. The polish also flattens idiolect separation: a ruthless older brother and a frightened retired operative should not keep landing in the same essay-ready cadence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen and differentiate the exchanges at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:83, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91 and at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:175, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205. Keep Demetrius managerial and controlled, but let sibling shorthand, impatience, and interruption do more work; keep Grosz articulate, but make his caution audible through hedges, refusals, broken starts, and operationally specific fragments instead of mini-lectures.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised lunch exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:73 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91 and the revised Grosz exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:165 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205 each contain at least one pressure-disrupted line per speaker, such as an interruption, self-correction, unfinished sentence, terse refusal, or abrupt redirect, and no stretch of three consecutive explanatory mini-speeches without a leverage shift or concrete interruption. FAIL if Demetrius and Grosz still sound like adjacent versions of the same polished explainer voice.

findings.problem: Once the chapter finds its political metaphor, it keeps re-translating the same point through 'infrastructure,' 'system,' 'machine,' and related abstract framing. Some of that lexicon echoes the style-bible calibration language too closely, and the repetition turns Damian's POV into thematic paraphrase. By the walk home and closing paragraph, the prose is still explaining what the reader already understands instead of letting image, silence, and concrete consequence carry the beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim and diversify the repeated abstract framing at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:213, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:215, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:245. Keep one or two strategically placed abstract terms if needed, but make the later paragraphs advance through concrete political detail, bodily response, or object/image work from the room, the walk, and the box rather than re-naming the conflict as a system.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the late-chapter beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:213 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:215 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:243 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:245 add new sensory or emotional information instead of restating the machine/infrastructure thesis, and if the closing image lands on a concrete consequence rather than another abstract paraphrase of the circuit. FAIL if those later passages still rely on the same infrastructure/system/machine lexicon to explain what the reader already understands from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:165 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205.

summary: Fails across all four lenses. The chapter does make Damian's isolation concrete and successfully plants the Eden photo, but its central reveal arrives as a low-friction briefing instead of a dangerous scene, the major conversations share an over-composed thesis-speech cadence, the prose keeps paraphrasing the same infrastructure/system insight after it has already landed, and the photo passage contains a canon-breaking age/timeline error.
